memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Group

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: Group

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsGetGroupListRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetGroupListResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetGroupList

briefdescription.para: AKA "SearchGroups"; get list of groups.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Only shows OPEN and PUBLIC group types.
Can search based on the group name by filling the "groupName" query param.

parameterdescription.para:
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FGetGroupConfigListResponse&.
Result is simply a FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse + pagination info.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsCreateGroupRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreateGroup

briefdescription.para: Creates a new group.

listitem.para: Requires valid user authentication.

There are some fields that needs to be fulfilled.
groupDescription: the description of the group (optional).
groupIcon: group icon URL link (optional).
groupName: name of the group.
groupRegion: region of the group.
groupRules: rules for specific group. It consists of groupCustomRule that can be used to save custom rule, and groupPredefinedRules that has similar usage with configuration, but this rule only works in specific group.
allowedAction: available action in group service. It consist of joinGroup and inviteGroup.
ruleAttribute: attribute of the player that needs to be checked.
ruleCriteria: criteria of the value. The value will be in enum of EQUAL, MINIMUM, MAXIMUM.
ruleValue: value that needs to be checked.
customAttributes: additional custom group attributes (optional).

parameterdescription.para: New group detail request.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetGroup

briefdescription.para: Get single single group info (by groupId).

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Gets single group information.

parameterdescription.para:
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, bool bCompletelyReplace, FAccelByteModelsGroupUpdatable const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateGroup

briefdescription.para: Update existing group.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP [UPDATE]".
Checks the group ID of the user based on the access token and compares it with the group ID in path parameter.
Checks the member role of the user based on the access token.
Supports partial update (empty elements will convert to null)

parameterdescription.para: Instead of partially-update, do you want to completely replace ALL info?

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteGroup

briefdescription.para: Delete existing group.

listitem.para: Checks if groupID exists before deleting.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP [DELETE]".

parameterdescription.para:
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FAccelByteModelsUpdateGroupCustomAttributesRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateGroupCustomAttributes

briefdescription.para: Replaces current group custom attributes entirely.

listitem.para: Requires valid user authentication.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP [UPDATE]".
Checks group ID of the user based on the access token and compares with group ID in path param.
Checks the member role of the user based on the access token.

parameterdescription.para: Arbitrary {}.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FAccelByteModelsUpdateCustomRulesRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateGroupCustomRule

briefdescription.para: Update custom (arbitrary) group rule.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Checks group ID of the user (via access token) and compares with group ID in path param.
Checks member role of the user based on access token.

parameterdescription.para: Arbitrary {}.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, EAccelByteAllowedAction AllowedAction, FAccelByteModelsUpdateGroupPredefinedRuleRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateGroupPredefinedRule

briefdescription.para: Update predefined group rule.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP [UPDATE]".
Checks group ID of the user (via access token) and compares with group ID in path param.
Checks member role of the user based on access token.
If rule action is not defined in the group, it will be added immediately.

parameterdescription.para: eg: createGroup, joinedGroup.
RuleDetail { RuleAttribute, RuleCriteria, RuleValue }.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, EAccelByteAllowedAction AllowedAction, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteGroupPredefinedRule

briefdescription.para: Delete predefined group rule, based on the allowed action.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP [UPDATE]".
Checks the group ID of the user based on the access token, then compares it with the group ID in path parameter.
Checks the member role of the user based on the access token.

parameterdescription.para: eg: createGroup, joinedGroup.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Void Result
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: AcceptGroupInvitation

briefdescription.para: Accepts an invitation from a 3rd-party group's group member to group up.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
If specific user is !invited in the specific group ID, throw errorif the user !invited yet.
Checks if the user who access this endpoint already joined the specific group.
Deletes all requests (invite / join request) for the user who accesses this endpoint.
Existing members will receive notification of the newly-accepted member.

parameterdescription.para: of the group that invited you, that you are accepting the invite to.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RejectGroupInvitation

briefdescription.para: Rejects an invitation from a 3rd-party group's group member to group up.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
If specific user is !invited in the specific group ID, throw errorif the user !invited yet.
Checks if the user who access this endpoint already joined the specific group.

parameterdescription.para: of the group that invited you, that you are rejecting the invite from.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsJoinGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: JoinGroup

briefdescription.para: Join into specific group and become a group member.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Checks the the the group type based on the groupID.
Checks if the user who access this endpoint already joined the specific group.
Returns status field, for whether the user JOINED or REQUESTED to join the specific group.

More Info:
User cannot join to the group with PRIVATE type.
Joining PUBLIC group type will create join request and need approval. from the privileged group member to accept the request to become the member.
Joining OPEN group type will make this user become member of that group immediately.

parameterdescription.para: of the group you want to join.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CancelJoinGroupRequest

briefdescription.para: Cancel the Join group request.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.

parameterdescription.para: of the !Open group type you asked to join, but now want to cancel.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FAccelByteModelsGetGroupMembersListByGroupIdRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetGroupMemberListResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetGroupMembersListByGroupId

briefdescription.para: Get list of group members (by GroupId).

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.

parameterdescription.para: of the group you want to get a members list from.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: LeaveGroup

briefdescription.para: Leave the group you're currently in.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Admin is not allowed to leave the group.
Will also give response if user does not belong to any group.

Admin is not allowed to leave the group.
If an Admin wants to leave the group, see DeleteGroup.
Still gives response if the user does not belong to any group.

parameterdescription.para: Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetUserGroupInfoResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetUserGroupInfoByUserId

briefdescription.para: Get list of group members by group id.

listitem.para: Required valid user auth.
get user group information by UserId.
If user !belongs to any group, a warning will return.

Group Member Status:
JOIN: status of user requested to join group.
INVITE: status of user invited to a group.
JOINED: status of user already joined to a group.

parameterdescription.para: of the selected user; you want want to get this user's list of group members.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: InviteUserToGroup

briefdescription.para: Invite the other user to your group.

listitem.para: Required valid user auth.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:INVITE [CREATE]".
If specific user already has the join request, response will notify they have a pending accept / reject.
Invited user will receive notification through lobby.

parameterdescription.para: of the user you want to invite to your group.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: AcceptGroupJoinRequest

briefdescription.para: Accept [other] user's group join request.

listitem.para: Required valid user auth.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:JOIN [CREATE]".
If specific user was not asked to join this specific group, response will return error that they "need a join request".
Will also check if specific user already joined the specific group.

This also works when a user invites themselves (JoinGroup) to join a PUBLIC group.
Rather than an OPEN group (where players can just join without permission).

parameterdescription.para: of the user who wants to join your group.

Called upon successful op.
Returns { GroupId, UserId }
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RejectGroupJoinRequest

briefdescription.para: Reject [other] user's group join request.

listitem.para: Required valid user auth.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:JOIN [CREATE]".
If specific user was not asked to join this specific group, response will return error that they "need a join request".
Will also check if specific user already joined the specific group.

This also works when a user invites themselves (JoinGroup) to join a PUBLIC group.
Rrather than an OPEN group players can just join.

parameterdescription.para: of the user you do NOT want to join your group.

Called upon successful op.
Returns { GroupId, UserId }
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsKickGroupMemberResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: KickGroupMember

briefdescription.para: Kick a group member out of the group.

listitem.para: Required valid user auth.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:KICK [CREATE]".
Validates the kicker's: member, group info and role perms.

parameterdescription.para: of the user you want to kick from your group.

Called upon successful op.
Returns { GroupId, KickedUserId }
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsLimitOffsetRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRolesListResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetMemberRoles

briefdescription.para: Get list of [group] member roles.

listitem.para: Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:ROLE [READ]".

parameterdescription.para: { Limit=1, Offset=0 }
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &MemberRoleId, FAccelByteModelsUserIdWrapper const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetUserGroupInfoResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: AssignMemberRole

briefdescription.para: Assign a role to a group member.

listitem.para: AKA AddMemberRole.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:ROLE [UPDATE]".

parameterdescription.para: of the role you want to assign.
{ UserId } of the user you want to assign the role to.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &MemberRoleId, FAccelByteModelsUserIdWrapper const &RequestContent, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteMemberRole

briefdescription.para: Remove a role from a group member.

listitem.para: AKA RevokeMemberRole, RemoveMemberRole.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:ROLE [UPDATE]".

parameterdescription.para: of the role you want to delete.
{ UserId } of the user you want to delete the role from.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FAccelByteModelsLimitOffsetRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRequestsListResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetGroupJoinRequests

briefdescription.para: Get list of join requests in a specific group.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:JOIN [READ]".
Group members needs to have permission (+belong to the group) to access this endpoint.

parameterdescription.para: of the group you want to see the join requests from.
{ Limit=1, Offset=0 } for pagination.
Paginated.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsLimitOffsetRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRequestsListResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetGroupInvitationRequests

briefdescription.para: Get group invitation request list for the user calling this endpoint.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Checks any group invitation for this user.

parameterdescription.para: { Limit=1, Offset=0 } for pagination.
Paginated.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsCreateGroupRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreateV2Group

briefdescription.para: Creates a new group.

listitem.para: Requires valid user authentication.

parameterdescription.para: New group detail request.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &GroupIds, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetGroupListResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetGroupsByGroupIds

briefdescription.para: Gets a collection of group information.

listitem.para: Requires valid user authentication

parameterdescription.para: A list of group ids to get the group information from.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGetGroupListResponse&. Support paging.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FAccelByteModelsUpdateGroupRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateV2Group

briefdescription.para: Update existing group.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP [UPDATE]".
Checks the group ID of the user based on the access token and compares it with the group ID in path parameter.
Checks the member role of the user based on the access token.
Supports partial update (empty elements will convert to null)

parameterdescription.para:
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteV2Group

briefdescription.para: Delete existing group.

listitem.para: Checks if groupID exists before deleting.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP [DELETE]".

parameterdescription.para:
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FAccelByteModelsUpdateGroupCustomAttributesRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateV2GroupCustomAttributes

briefdescription.para: Replaces current group custom attributes entirely.

listitem.para: Requires valid user authentication.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP [UPDATE]".
Checks group ID of the user based on the access token and compares with group ID in path param.
Checks the member role of the user based on the access token.

parameterdescription.para: Arbitrary {}.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FAccelByteModelsUpdateCustomRulesRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateV2GroupCustomRule

briefdescription.para: Update custom (arbitrary) group rule.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Checks group ID of the user (via access token) and compares with group ID in path param.
Checks member role of the user based on access token.

parameterdescription.para: Arbitrary {}.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, EAccelByteAllowedAction AllowedAction, FAccelByteModelsUpdateGroupPredefinedRuleRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGroupInformation > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateV2GroupPredefinedRule

briefdescription.para: Update predefined group rule.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP [UPDATE]".
Checks group ID of the user (via access token) and compares with group ID in path param.
Checks member role of the user based on access token.
If rule action is not defined in the group, it will be added immediately.

parameterdescription.para: eg: createGroup, joinedGroup.
RuleDetail { RuleAttribute, RuleCriteria, RuleValue }.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is const FAccelByteModelsGroupInformationResponse&.
Called upon failed op.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP [UPDATE]".
Checks the group ID of the user based on the access token, then compares it with the group ID in path parameter.
Checks the member role of the user based on the access token.

parameterdescription.para: eg: createGroup, joinedGroup.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Void Result
Called upon failed op.

memberdef.name: GetUserGroupStatusInfo

briefdescription.para: Gets user group status information.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP [READ]"

parameterdescription.para: The group id the user belongs to.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is FAccelByteModelsGetUserGroupInfoResponse&.

memberdef.name: GetGroupInviteRequestList

briefdescription.para: Get Group Invite Request List for specific group. Group members needs to have permission and also belong to the group to access this endpoint.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:JOIN [READ]"

parameterdescription.para: { Limit=1, Offset=0 } for pagination.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRequestsListResponse.
This will be called when the operation fail.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FAccelByteModelsLimitOffsetRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRequestsListResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetGroupJoinRequestList

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:JOIN [READ]"

parameterdescription.para: { Limit=1, Offset=0 } for pagination.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRequestsListResponse
This will be called when the operation fail.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CancelGroupMemberInvitation

briefdescription.para: Cancel invitation to specific user.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:INVITE [DELETE]"

parameterdescription.para: user id to which the invitation will be cancelled.
group id which sent the invitation.

This will be called when the operation succeeded.
Result is FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse
This will be called when the operation fail.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: AcceptV2GroupInvitation

briefdescription.para: Accepts an invitation from a 3rd-party group's group member to group up.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
If specific user is !invited in the specific group ID, throw errorif the user !invited yet.
Checks if the user who access this endpoint already joined the specific group.
Deletes all requests (invite / join request) for the user who accesses this endpoint.
Existing members will receive notification of the newly-accepted member.

parameterdescription.para: of the group that invited you, that you are accepting the invite to.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RejectV2GroupInvitation

briefdescription.para: Rejects an invitation from a 3rd-party group's group member to group up.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
If specific user is !invited in the specific group ID, throw errorif the user !invited yet.
Checks if the user who access this endpoint already joined the specific group.

parameterdescription.para: of the group that invited you, that you are rejecting the invite from.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsJoinGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: JoinV2Group

briefdescription.para: Join into specific group and become a group member.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Checks the the the group type based on the groupID.
Checks if the user who access this endpoint already joined the specific group.
Returns status field, for whether the user JOINED or REQUESTED to join the specific group.

More Info:
User cannot join to the group with PRIVATE type.
Joining PUBLIC group type will create join request and need approval. from the privileged group member to accept the request to become the member.
Joining OPEN group type will make this user become member of that group immediately.

parameterdescription.para: of the group you want to join.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: LeaveV2Group

briefdescription.para: Leave the group you're currently in.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication.
Admin is not allowed to leave the group.
Will also give response if user does not belong to any group.

Admin is not allowed to leave the group.
If an Admin wants to leave the group, see DeleteGroup.
Still gives response if the user does not belong to any group.

parameterdescription.para: of the group you want to leave.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: InviteUserToV2Group

briefdescription.para: Invite the other user to your group.

listitem.para: Required valid user auth.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:INVITE [CREATE]".
If specific user already has the join request, response will notify they have a pending accept / reject.
Invited user will receive notification through lobby.

parameterdescription.para: of the user you want to invite to your group.
of the group.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: AcceptV2GroupJoinRequest

briefdescription.para: Accept [other] user's group join request.

listitem.para: Required valid user auth.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:JOIN [CREATE]".
If specific user was not asked to join this specific group, response will return error that they "need a join request".
Will also check if specific user already joined the specific group.

This also works when a user invites themselves (JoinGroup) to join a PUBLIC group.
Rather than an OPEN group (where players can just join without permission).

parameterdescription.para: of the user who wants to join your group.
of the group.

Called upon successful op.
Returns { GroupId, UserId }
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsMemberRequestGroupResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: RejectV2GroupJoinRequest

briefdescription.para: Reject [other] user's group join request.

listitem.para: Required valid user auth.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:JOIN [CREATE]".
If specific user was not asked to join this specific group, response will return error that they "need a join request".
Will also check if specific user already joined the specific group.

This also works when a user invites themselves (JoinGroup) to join a PUBLIC group.
Rrather than an OPEN group players can just join.

parameterdescription.para: of the user you do NOT want to join your group.
of the group.

Called upon successful op.
Returns { GroupId, UserId }
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, FString const &GroupId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsKickGroupMemberResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: KickV2GroupMember

briefdescription.para: Kick a group member out of the group.

listitem.para: Required valid user auth.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:KICK [CREATE]".
Validates the kicker's: member, group info and role perms.

parameterdescription.para: of the user you want to kick from your group.

Called upon successful op.
Returns { GroupId, KickedUserId }
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsLimitOffsetRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetGroupMemberListResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetMyJoinedGroupInfo

briefdescription.para: Get user group joined information. If user does not belong to any group, it will return warning to give information about it.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication

parameterdescription.para: { Limit=1, Offset=0 } for pagination.
This will be called when the operation is succeeded.
This will be called when the operation is fail.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsLimitOffsetRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRequestsListResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetMyJoinGroupRequest

briefdescription.para: Get My Join Request To The Groups. It will check any join request group for this user.

listitem.para: Required valid user authentication

parameterdescription.para: { Limit=1, Offset=0 } for pagination.

This will be called when the operation is succeeded.
Result is FAccelByteModelsGetGroupMemberListResponse
This will be called when the operation is fail.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &MemberRoleId, FString const &GroupId, FAccelByteModelsUserIdWrapper const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetUserGroupInfoResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: AssignV2MemberRole

briefdescription.para: Assign a role to a group member.

listitem.para: AKA AddMemberRole.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:ROLE [UPDATE]".

parameterdescription.para: of the role you want to assign.
of the member.
{ UserId } of the user and group you want to assign the role to.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &MemberRoleId, FString const &GroupId, FAccelByteModelsUserIdWrapper const &RequestContent, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteV2MemberRole

briefdescription.para: Remove a role from a group member.

listitem.para: AKA RevokeMemberRole, RemoveMemberRole.
Required Member Role Permission: "GROUP:ROLE [UPDATE]".

parameterdescription.para: of the role you want to delete.
of the member.
{ UserId } of the user you want to delete the role from.
Called upon successful op.
Called upon failed op.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsLimitOffsetRequest const &RequestContent, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRolesListResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetAllMemberRoles

briefdescription.para: Get list of member roles.

parameterdescription.para: { Limit=1, Offset=0 } for pagination.

This will be called when the operation is succeeded.
Result is FAccelByteModelsGetMemberRolesListResponse
This will be called when the operation is fail.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: ()=delete
memberdef.name: Group

memberdef.argsstring: (Group const &)=delete
memberdef.name: Group

memberdef.argsstring: (Group &&)=delete
memberdef.name: Group

memberdef.argsstring: (const EAccelByteAllowedAction &AllowedAction)
memberdef.name: ConvertGroupAllowedActionToString

briefdescription.para: Provide APIs to access Group [Management] service.

listitem.para: While authed, Namespace is automatically passed to all Requests.
